title: Hydrocodone Combination Products: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text:

Other uses for this medicine 
This medication may be prescribed for other uses; ask your doctor or pharmacist for more information.
What special precautions should I follow? 
Before taking a hydrocodone combination product, tell your doctor or pharmacist if you are allergic to this drug, any part of this drug, or any other 
drugs, foods or substances. Tell your doctor or pharmacist about the allergy and what 
symptoms you had. some medications should not be taken with hydrocodone combination products. Make sure you have discussed any 
medications you are currently taking or plan to take before starting a hydrocodone combination product with your doctor 
and pharmacist. Before starting, stopping, or changing any medications while taking a hydrocodone combination product, 
please get the advice of your doctor or pharmacist. tell your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking the following medications or have stopped taking them within the past two weeks: isocarboxazid, linezolid, methylene blue, phenelzine, selegiline, or tranylcypromine. the following nonprescription or herbal products may interact with h
